heading: Prohibition on incandescent lamps by Coast Guard
label: 17141 Prohibition on incandescent lamps by Coast Guard
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2

children.heading: Prohibition
children.label: a Prohibition
children.text: Except as provided by subsection (b), on and after , a general service incandescent lamp shall not be purchased or installed in a Coast Guard facility by or on behalf of the Coast Guard.January 1, 2009
necessary due to purpose or design, including medical, security, and industrial applications;
reasonable due to the architectural or historical value of a light fixture installed before ; orJanuary 1, 2009
the Commandant of the Coast Guard determines that operational requirements necessitate the use of a general service incandescent lamp.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: In this section, the term “facility” does not include a vessel or aircraft of the Coast Guard.
